topCategories.title: Top Categories
topCategories.description: Browse by subject and find the right courses for you. Explore our most popular categories and start learning today.

trendedCourses.title: Trended Courses
trendedCourses.description: Discover our most popular courses. Start with what others are learning and get ahead.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.description: Real feedback from learners who completed our courses. See how we help people reach their goals.

teachers.title: Expert Teachers
teachers.description: Learn from industry professionals and experienced educators who are committed to your success.

about.expertLedDesc: Learn from instructors with real industry experience.
about.practicalDesc: Hands-on projects designed for real skills.
about.cardDesc: Build skills with structured learning paths, real practice, and support.

partners.heading: Our Partners
partners.description: Trusted by leading organizations and brands.

SEO.defaultTitle: Qutell - The best site for your courses
SEO.defaultDescription: Discover our unique courses at the best prices. Shop now and have a unique experience.

footer.title: Win Reward Points
footer.description: Buy course, complete course, increase activity & many more ways to win club points. You will be able to use your club points to get free prizes and courses. Start using the system now and collect points!
footer.copyrightDefault: Copyright © 2024 Qutell. All rights reserved | Made by Qutell

footer.newsletterDescription: Get updates on new courses, tips, and offers.

unlock-your-potential.title: Unlock Your Potential
unlock-your-potential.description: Discover your strengths and grow with our courses and resources. We help you build the skills and confidence you need to achieve your goals.

privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy-policy.description: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.

sitemap.title: Sitemap
sitemap.description: Browse our sitemap to find courses, categories, and all sections of our learning platform. We organize content to help you navigate easily.

featured-courses.title: Featured Courses
featured-courses.description: Explore our handpicked featured courses. These are some of the most popular and highly rated programs to help you learn and grow.

join-us.title: Join Us
join-us.description: Become part of our learning community. Create an account to enroll in courses, track your progress, and connect with instructors and fellow learners.

learn.title: Learn with Qutell
learn.description: Access a wide range of courses designed for every level. Learn at your own pace with expert instructors and practical projects.

teach.title: Teach on Qutell
teach.description: Share your expertise with learners worldwide. Create and publish courses, set your schedule, and grow your audience on our platform.

git-the-app.title: Get the App
git-the-app.description: Download our mobile app to learn on the go. Access your courses, watch lessons, and track your progress from your phone or tablet.

careers.title: Careers
careers.description: Join our team and help shape the future of online learning. We are always looking for talented people in teaching, design, and technology.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Read tips, updates, and stories about learning, teaching, and career growth. Stay informed with our latest articles and resources.

help.title: Help and Support
help.description: Find answers to common questions, how-to guides, and contact our support team. We are here to help you get the most out of our platform.

terms.title: Terms
terms.description: Please read our terms of use carefully. By using our platform you agree to these terms and our community guidelines.

certificate.title: Certificate Verification
certificate.description: Use this page to verify the authenticity of certificates issued by Qutell. Enter the certificate ID to confirm its validity.

free-course.title: Free Course
free-course.description: Start learning with our free course. Get a taste of our platform and content at no cost. Enroll now and begin your learning journey.

are-you-sure-delete: Are you sure you want to delete this review?
